revision.comment: Bot: mark 2 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24017044590|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:年中行事]]


'''Annual Events''' (年中行事, ねんちゅうぎょうじ or ねんじゅうぎょうじ) refer to events held at specific times each year. Narrowly, it can mean traditional matters, particularly court-related rituals, but broadly, it encompasses everything from personal events to nationwide and even global occurrences.
== Annual Events in Japan ==
Annual events in Japan are often tied to agricultural activities associated with the [[:en:four seasons|four seasons]]. Many have been shaped by the lives of the imperial court, {{ill|Nobility|en|Nobility|qid=Q134737|lt=nobility|1=Nobility}}, and {{ill|samurai|ja|武士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/samurai|1=bushi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1975935}}, which have been absorbed into the lives of the common people.<ref>Hideo Haga, "Travels with Orikuchi Shinobu into Ancient Times," Keio University Press, 2009, pp. 94–103</ref>. Traditional events such as Tanabata are sometimes included here (Tanabata and Christmas are both considered traditional events).
=== April ===
{{ill|Inari Festival|ja|稲荷祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inari Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135551094}} - {{ill|Buddha's Birthday|en|Buddha's Birthday|qid=Q5348941|lt=Kambutsue|1=Buddha's Birthday}} - {{ill|Jūsan Mairi|ja|十三詣り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsan Mairi|1=Jūsan Mairi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11404777}} - {{ill|Entrance Ceremony|ja|入学式|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Entrance Ceremony|1=school entrance ceremony|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11388885}} - {{ill|Hanami|en|Hanami|qid=Q210150|lt=Cherry Blossom Viewing|1=Hanami}}
=== May ===
{{ill|Aoi Matsuri|en|Aoi Matsuri|qid=Q773085|lt=Aoi Matsuri|1=Aoi Matsuri}} - {{ill|Shirouma Ceremony|ja|白馬節会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirouma Ceremony|1=Aouma no Sechie|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11580481}} - {{ill|Kanda Matsuri|en|Kanda Matsuri|qid=Q218646|lt=Kanda Matsuri|1=Kanda Matsuri}} - {{ill|Koinobori|en|Koinobori|qid=Q779745|lt=Koinobori|1=Koinobori}} - {{ill|Sanja Matsuri|en|Sanja Matsuri|qid=Q219122|lt=Sanja Matsuri|1=Sanja Matsuri}} - {{ill|Dragon Boat Festival|en|Dragon Boat Festival|qid=Q1254268|lt=Dragon Boat Festival|1=Dragon Boat Festival}} - {{ill|Sports day|en|Sports day|qid=Q1133616|lt=Sports Festival|1=Sports day}}
=== June ===
{{ill|Itsukushima Shrine Annual Festival|ja|厳島神社例祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Itsukushima Shrine Annual Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500943|1=Itsukushima Shrine Annual Festival}} - {{ill|Sannō Matsuri|en|Sannō Matsuri|qid=Q218663|lt=Sanno Festival|1=Sannō Matsuri}} - {{ill|Insect Sending Ceremony|ja|虫送り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Insect Sending Ceremony|1=mushi okuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11241352}} - {{ill|Ōharae-shiki|en|Ōharae-shiki|qid=Q11261910|lt=Oharae|1=Ōharae-shiki}}
=== July ===
{{ill|Summer vacation|en|Summer vacation|qid=Q1155370|lt=Summer Vacation|1=Summer vacation}} - {{ill|River Opening|ja|川開き|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/River Opening|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|Mountain Opening|ja|山開き|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mountain Opening|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 開山|1=Mountain Opening|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11655210}} - {{ill|Sea Opening|ja|海開き|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sea Opening|1=umibiraki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11559379}} - {{ill|Gion Matsuri|en|Gion Matsuri|qid=Q979873|lt=Gion Matsuri|1=Gion Matsuri}} - {{ill|Qixi Festival|en|Qixi Festival|qid=Q13423122|lt=Tanabata|1=Qixi Festival}} - {{ill|Nachi Fire Festival|ja|扇祭|那智火祭り|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nachi Fire Festival|1=Ōgi Matsuri|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3334755}} - {{ill|Tenjin Matsuri|en|Tenjin Matsuri|qid=Q5371810|lt=Tenjin Matsuri|1=Tenjin Matsuri}} - {{ill|Nebuta Festival|ja|侫武多|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nebuta Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ねぶた|1=nebuta|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q861941}} - {{ill|Obon|en|Obon|qid=Q1154888|lt=Obon|1=Obon}} - {{ill|Ochūgen|ja|御中元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ochūgen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 中元|1=Ghost Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q696781}}
=== August ===
{{ill|Kitano Shrine Annual Festival|ja|北野天満宮例祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitano Shrine Annual Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500947|1=Kitano Shrine Annual Festival}} - {{ill|Jūgoya|ja|十五夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūgoya|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 月見|1=Tsukimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1050292}} - {{ill|Tsukimi|en|Tsukimi|qid=Q1050292|lt=Moon Viewing|1=Tsukimi}} - {{ill|Hassaku|ja|八朔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassaku|qq=}} - {{ill|Life release|en|Life release|qid=Q11078912|lt=Hōjōe|1=Life release}}
=== September ===
{{ill|Iwashimizu Hachimangu Annual Festival|ja|石清水八幡宮例祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwashimizu Hachimangu Annual Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500952|1=Iwashimizu Hachimangu Annual Festival}} - {{ill|Jūsanya|ja|十三夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jūsanya|1=Thirteenth Night|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18988720}} - {{ill|Double Ninth Festival|en|Double Ninth Festival|qid=Q463754|lt=Double Ninth Festival|1=Double Ninth Festival}} - {{ill|Tsurugaoka Hachimangu Annual Festival|ja|鶴岡八幡宮例祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsurugaoka Hachimangu Annual Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500954|1=Tsurugaoka Hachimangu Annual Festival}} - {{ill|Kishiwada Danjiri Matsuri|en|Kishiwada Danjiri Matsuri|qid=Q6416609|lt=Kishiwada Danjiri Festival|1=Kishiwada Danjiri Matsuri}} - {{ill|Qiufen|en|Qiufen|qid=Q1200436|lt=Autumn Equinox|1=Qiufen}} - {{ill|Respect for the Aged Day|en|Respect for the Aged Day|qid=Q1186127|lt=Respect for the Aged Day|1=Respect for the Aged Day}}
=== October ===
{{ill|Inoko Festival|ja|亥子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inoko Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 亥の子|1=Inoko Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11374156}} - {{ill|Eshiki|ja|会式|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eshiki|1=Eshiki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11381197}} - {{ill|Ebisu Festival|ja|夷講|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to えびす講}} - {{ill|Kunchi|ja|くんち|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunchi|1=kunchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11265757}} - {{ill|Kurama Fire Festival|ja|鞍馬火祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurama Fire Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鞍馬の火祭}} - {{ill|Kotohira Shrine Annual Festival|ja|金刀比羅宮例祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotohira Shrine Annual Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135500957|1=Kotohira Shrine Annual Festival}} - {{ill|Seimon払い|ja|誓文払い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seimon払い|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|Tōkanya|ja|十日夜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōkanya|1=Tōkanya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9384647}} - {{ill|Halloween|en|Halloween|qid=Q251868|lt=Halloween|1=Halloween}}
=== November ===
{{ill|Kaomise|ja|顔見世|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaomise|1=Kaomise|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11665098}} - {{ill|Shichi-Go-San|en|Shichi-Go-San|qid=Q1072387|lt=Shichi-Go-San|1=Shichi-Go-San}} - {{ill|Tori no Ichi|ja|酉の市|1=Tori-no-Ichi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori no Ichi|13=User:Immanuelle/Tori-no-Ichi|qq=}} - {{ill|Fuyumatsuri|ja|鞴祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fuyumatsuri|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135503326}}
=== December ===
{{ill|Winter Vacation|ja|冬休み|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Winter Vacation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Winter vacation|qid=Q860189}} - {{ill|Bodhi Day|en|Bodhi Day|qid=Q400077|lt=Jōdōe|1=Bodhi Day}} - {{ill|Shogatsu Jishime|ja|正月事始め|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogatsu Jishime|1=Shogatsu Jishime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545487}} - {{ill|Kasuga Wakamiya Shrine Annual Festival|ja|春日若宮神社例祭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Wakamiya Shrine Annual Festival|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135503328|1=Kasuga Wakamiya Shrine Annual Festival}} - {{ill|Daikon Stew Festival|ja|大根焚き|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daikon Stew Festival|1=Daikodaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11436267}} - {{ill|Susu Harai|ja|煤払い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susu Harai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 掃除|1=Cleaning|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q12773274}} - {{ill|Year-End Gift|ja|歳暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Year-End Gift|1=Year-End Gift|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11546825}} - {{ill|Nuo folk religion|en|Nuo folk religion|qid=Q5371419|lt=Oni Festival|1=Nuo folk religion}} - {{ill|Winter solstice|en|Winter solstice|qid=Q207932|lt=Winter Solstice|1=Winter solstice}} - {{ill|Christmas|en|Christmas|qid=Q19809|lt=Christmas|1=Christmas}} - {{ill|Year-End Market|ja|歳の市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Year-End Market|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - {{ill|House Cleaning|ja|大掃除|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/House Cleaning|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 掃除|1=Cleaning|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q12773274}} - {{ill|Joya no Kane|en|Joya no Kane|qid=Q485822|lt=Joya no Kane|1=Joya no Kane}} - {{ill|Toshikoshi Soba|ja|年越しそば|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toshikoshi Soba|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 年越し蕎麦|1=Toshikoshi soba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9089179}} - {{ill|Ōmisoka|en|Ōmisoka|qid=Q2357104|lt=Ōmisoka|1=Ōmisoka}}
